req.title: Account statement generation (boundary variant)
req.statement: A customer shall request monthly statements as PDF; statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.
preconditions: account.owner == caller

doc.reasoning: The requirement defines three key partitions: (1) statements within 7 years served from hot storage, (2) statements older than 7 years served from cold storage, and (3) periods with no activity returning 404. The 7-year threshold introduces two critical BVA points: exactly 7 years ago (boundary between hot/cold) and exactly 7 years minus one month (hot storage, last valid hot month). Additional negative paths cover cold-storage unavailability (503) and unauthorised access (403). A state-transition case verifies the retrieval-log write after a successful fetch, tracing the 'retrieval logged' postcondition. Each test uses fixtures for auth tokens and a shared base URL to remain self-contained.

tests.name: test_statement_recent_month_returns_pdf
preconditions: Authenticated customer token available via <auth_token> fixture
Account has activity in the target month (within last 6 years)
Hot storage is available
actions: GET /statements/{month} with month = first day of 3 years ago
expected: Retrieval event written to audit log
trace: R-FIN-033: PDF delivered for statement within 7-year window
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_statement_recent_month_returns_pdf(base_url, auth_headers, assert_audit_logged):
    month = (date.today() - relativedelta(years=3)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/statements/{month}",
        headers=auth_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert "application/pdf" in resp.headers.get("Content-Type", "")
    assert len(resp.content) > 0
    assert_audit_logged(event="statement_retrieved", month=month)

tests.name: test_statement_no_activity_returns_404
preconditions: Authenticated customer token available via <auth_token> fixture
Account has NO activity in the target month
Target month is within the last 7 years
actions: GET /statements/{month} with month known to have no transactions
Assert response body contains error detail
expected: Response body indicates no activity for the requested period
trace: R-FIN-033: error pathway - 404 if no activity in period
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_statement_no_activity_returns_404(base_url, auth_headers, month_with_no_activity):
    resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/statements/{month_with_no_activity}",
        headers=auth_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 404
    body = resp.json()
    assert "no activity" in body.get("detail", "").lower()

tests.name: test_statement_exactly_7_years_ago_uses_cold_storage
preconditions: Authenticated customer token available via <auth_token> fixture
Account has activity in the month exactly 7 years ago
Cold storage is available and seeded with statement for that month
actions: GET /statements/{month} where month = today minus exactly 7 years (year-month only)
expected: Retrieval event written to audit log with storage_tier=cold
trace: R-FIN-033: statements older than 7 years fetched from cold storage
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_statement_exactly_7_years_ago_uses_cold_storage(base_url, auth_headers, assert_audit_logged):
    month = (date.today() - relativedelta(years=7)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/statements/{month}",
        headers=auth_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert "application/pdf" in resp.headers.get("Content-Type", "")
    assert resp.headers.get("X-Storage-Tier") == "cold"
    assert_audit_logged(event="statement_retrieved", month=month, storage_tier="cold")

tests.name: test_statement_one_month_inside_7_year_boundary_uses_hot_storage
preconditions: Authenticated customer token available via <auth_token> fixture
Account has activity in the month exactly 7 years minus 1 month ago
Hot storage is available and contains that statement
actions: GET /statements/{month} where month = today minus 7 years plus 1 month
expected: Retrieval event written to audit log with storage_tier=hot
trace: R-FIN-033: boundary - last month still in hot storage (7yr - 1 month)
R-FIN-033: BVA lower boundary of cold storage partition
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_statement_one_month_inside_7_year_boundary_uses_hot_storage(base_url, auth_headers, assert_audit_logged):
    month = (date.today() - relativedelta(years=7) + relativedelta(months=1)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/statements/{month}",
        headers=auth_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert "application/pdf" in resp.headers.get("Content-Type", "")
    assert resp.headers.get("X-Storage-Tier") == "hot"
    assert_audit_logged(event="statement_retrieved", month=month, storage_tier="hot")

tests.name: test_statement_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503
preconditions: Authenticated customer token available via <auth_token> fixture
Target month is older than 7 years (requires cold storage)
Cold storage service is simulated as unavailable via <cold_storage_down> fixture
actions: Activate cold_storage_down fixture to simulate cold storage failure
GET /statements/{month} where month is 8 years ago
Assert response body contains error detail about cold storage
expected: Response body indicates cold storage is unavailable
trace: R-FIN-033: error pathway - 503 if cold storage unavailable
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_statement_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503(base_url, auth_headers, cold_storage_down):
    month = (date.today() - relativedelta(years=8)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    with cold_storage_down():
        resp = requests.get(
            f"{base_url}/statements/{month}",
            headers=auth_headers
        )
    assert resp.status_code == 503
    body = resp.json()
    assert "cold storage" in body.get("detail", "").lower()

tests.name: test_statement_unauthorized_caller_returns_403
preconditions: Two distinct customer accounts exist: owner and non-owner
Non-owner token available via <other_auth_headers> fixture
Target statement belongs to owner account, not the caller
actions: GET /statements/{month} using non-owner auth token for owner's account
trace: R-FIN-033: precondition - account.owner == caller; violation must be rejected
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_statement_unauthorized_caller_returns_403(base_url, other_auth_headers, owner_account_month):
    month = (date.today() - relativedelta(months=2)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/statements/{month}",
        headers=other_auth_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 403
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("detail") is not None

tests.name: test_retrieval_audit_log_written_after_successful_fetch
preconditions: Authenticated customer token available via <auth_token> fixture
Account has activity in the target month (within last 6 years)
Audit log service is available and queryable via <audit_log_client> fixture
actions: Record audit log count before request
Query audit log for new retrieval event
Assert log entry exists with correct account and month
expected: Audit log gains exactly one new entry for the retrieval event
Log entry contains account_id, month, and timestamp
trace: R-FIN-033: state transition from requested -> delivered -> logged
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from datetime import date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_retrieval_audit_log_written_after_successful_fetch(
    base_url, auth_headers, audit_log_client, account_id
):
    month = (date.today() - relativedelta(months=4)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    before_count = audit_log_client.count(event="statement_retrieved", account_id=account_id)
    resp = requests.get(f"{base_url}/statements/{month}", headers=auth_headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    after_count = audit_log_client.count(event="statement_retrieved", account_id=account_id)
    assert after_count == before_count + 1
    last_entry = audit_log_client.latest(event="statement_retrieved", account_id=account_id)
    assert last_entry["month"] == month
    assert last_entry["account_id"] == account_id
    assert last_entry["timestamp"] is not None
